description: Summarizes long text to a specified size while preserving key information.

llmModelKey.description: The credential key for the LLM model to use for summarization

targetSize.description: Desired summary length in characters. If not specified, the LLM will determine the optimal length

lang.description: Summary language. Defaults to the source text language

combineStrategy.description: Strategy for combining chunk summaries: 'recursive' (recursive merging) or 'iterative' (sequential refinement, default)
